basicInfo.name: Yoo Jinho
basicInfo.flavor: Even when faced with life-threatening danger, Yoo Jinho remained steadfastly loyal to Sung Jinwoo, and seeing this is what eventually led Sung Jinwoo to trust him wholeheartedly.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Physical Attack plus 60% of Defense 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 60% of Physical Attack plus 70% of Defense.

Skill 1.name: Strike of Will
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 145% of Physical Attack plus 165% of Defense 1 time(s).
 - 85% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 85% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 4 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Turns: Stun duration becomes 4 turn(s).
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 170% of Physical Attack plus 200% of Defense.
 - Increases Chance: Stun chance becomes 100%.

Skill 2.name: Golden Shield
Skill 2.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 110% of the caster's Defense. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Barrier absorption becomes 130% of Defense.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: 12% Damage Resistance. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

Passive.name: Steely Endurance
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Defense Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Silence Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Silence Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Defense Boost to 18%.

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Instant ramen (has to eat it secretly because his father hates junk food), jet skis, freedom, loyalty
profile.story: Even when faced with life-threatening danger, Yoo Jinho remained steadfastly loyal to Sung Jinwoo, and seeing this is what eventually led Sung Jinwoo to trust him wholeheartedly.

basicInfo.name: Yoo Jinho
basicInfo.flavor: Although Yoo Jinho was a D-Rank hunter, he was able to enhance his fighting abilities by utilizing his vast wealth and resources to purchase and equip the most powerful gear that money could buy.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 45% of Physical Attack plus 55% of Defense 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 45% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 55% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Strike of Will
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Physical Attack plus 150% of Defense 1 time(s).
 - 85% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 150% of Magic Attack.

Skill 2.name: Golden Shield
Skill 2.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 100% of the caster's Defense. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

Passive.name: Steely Endurance
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Defense Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Silence Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Silence Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Defense Reduction to 11%.

profile.likes: Instant ramen (has to eat it secretly because his father hates junk food), jet skis, freedom, loyalty
profile.story: Although Yoo Jinho was a D-Rank hunter, he was able to enhance his fighting abilities by utilizing his vast wealth and resources to purchase and equip the most powerful gear that money could buy.

basicInfo.name: Yoo Jinho
basicInfo.flavor: The second son of Yoo Myunghan, the chairman of Yoojin Construction, one of the largest and most influential corporations in Korea. Anticipating that the nation's future would be shaped by hunters, Yoo Myunghan prepared to form a hunters guild, and Yoo Jinho decided to become a hunter so he could take center stage in his father's plans.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 40% of Physical Attack plus 50% of Defense 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 40% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Strike of Will
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 115% of Physical Attack plus 135% of Defense 1 time(s).
 - 70% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 115% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 135% of Magic Attack.

Skill 2.name: Golden Shield
Skill 2.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 90% of the caster's Defense. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

Passive.name: Steely Endurance
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Defense Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Silence Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Silence Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Defense Reduction to 8%.

profile.likes: Instant ramen (has to eat it secretly because his father hates junk food), jet skis, freedom, loyalty
profile.story: The second son of Yoo Myunghan, the chairman of Yoojin Construction, one of the largest and most influential corporations in Korea. Anticipating that the nation's future would be shaped by hunters, Yoo Myunghan prepared to form a hunters guild, and Yoo Jinho decided to become a hunter so he could take center stage in his father's plans.
